package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerProfilingBenchmarkingBenchmarkIncludesSetupInLoop() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_profiling_benchmarking_benchmark_includes_setup_in_loop"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Profiling and benchmarking. Flag Go benchmarks that perform setup inside the timed loop without ResetTimer."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
